/CAL: APD RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/X: APD RESTITUTION REPORT WAS NOTORDERED FOR TODAY'S HEARING,/14    GPROGRESS REPORT/PROG:08-05-19/CTORD:APD TO PREPARE RESTITUTION REPORT RE ALL VICTIMS/CONTD: RESTITUTION DETERMINATION AND RECEIPT OF APD RESTITUTION REPORT/X: THE DEFENDANT IS ORDEREDPRESENT UNLESS COUNSEL HAS AUTHORITY TO  ACCEPT RESTITUTION AMOUNT ON HIS BEHALF,/

/X:AS TO FELONY COUNT 3:/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 91D/CTS:91/24MREVIEW/RESTV/WS/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/OR25/X:AS TO MISDEMEANOR COUNT 5:/X:91 DAYS COUNTY JAIL WITH 91 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/VF2:150/CCC:COUNTS 3 & 5/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/CTORD:THAT THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWF/

/CAL:TO SET SENTENCING/CONTD:SENTENCING/TWS/OR/DOP/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PMON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/PRES:03-26-19/PPRF/

/CAL: PRELIMNINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 3 & 5/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD: TO SET SENTENCING/DOP/X: COURT DOES NOT ORDER A PRE-SENTENCE REPORT AT THIS TIME,  THE DEFENDANTWILL BE REFERRED TO APD FOR A PRESENTENCE REPORT WHILE ON HOME DETENTION RELEASE,  THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF HOME DETENTION WILL BE SET FORTH ON 01-24-19/X: COUNT 3 HAS A MANADATORY 6 MONTH COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE,  DEFENDANT WILL SERVE THIS SENTENCE WITH A COMBINATIONOF COUNTY JAIL THROUGH 01-24-19 AND HOME DETENTION FOR THE REMAINDER OF THE SENTENCE,  THE COURTS INTENTION AREFOR THE DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CTS AT THE TIME OF SENTENCING/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 01-14-19/987,2/BAIL:100000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
